data.summary: Insufficient evidence to validate the requirement for per-tenant and per-scope permission filtering.
data.assessment: The exploratory step requires validation of the requirement for 'per-tenant and per-scope permission filtering'. However, the evidence provided does not include any specific checks or API reads that confirm this requirement is satisfied. The linked use case mentions the need for permission filtering, but without concrete evidence or endpoints to validate this, the assessment remains inconclusive.
gaps: No evidence of per-tenant and per-scope permission filtering.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence for permission filtering
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify the per-tenant and per-scope permission filtering requirement.
